expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?

This is the official reference for what you should expect to pay at the crater."]},{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["📸 From your Stone Town photo"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A low-angle view looking up into the courtyard of a multi-story building with white stucco walls and Middle Eastern/Spanish-style architectural details. The building rises around a narrow open-air space under a bright blue sky, with strong sunlight creating sharp shadows. A striped awning and a wall-mounted lamp are visible on the left, and the overall impression is of an elegant historic hotel, residence, or courtyard complex with decorative, traditional design elements."]},{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["🎙️ From your crater-day voice memo"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Your driver-guide Emmanuel (not Richard from the office) made it one of the best days of your life — wildlife everywhere, right up close.
